title: Phuntsholing Heat Wave
lead: Phuntsholing is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.06. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Phuntsholing is causing extremely hot conditions, with a CDD of 9.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 75%, and the wind speed is 7.7 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The lack of cooling degree days and high humidity will exacerbate the heat-related issues in the city.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
